title: Update each harness LDT proof pair to assert the new harness-schemas v0.2 field
description: After harness-schemas v0.2.0 ships and harness organisms backfill sessionSchemaRefs/deploymentSchemaRefs, each existing harness LDT proof pair under .tmp/repl-proofs/ needs a new predicate: assert aspects.harness.doc.schemaVersion == 0.2.0 AND assert sessionSchemaRefs (or deploymentSchemaRefs) is present and references the expected family. Per-harness proofs to update: 2026-05-11-digikoma-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift, 2026-05-12-clide-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift, 2026-05-12-pi-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift, 2026-05-12-hulk-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift, 2026-05-12-gemini-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift, 2026-05-12-codex-organism-v1.0.0-fit.swift (plus future apple-pi proof). Each negative companion gets a corresponding new failure expectation for the missing-ref case.
